opportunities.name: mautic/mautic
opportunities.signal: Large marketing automation base with visible maintenance load.
opportunities.thesis: Mautic is a mature marketing automation surface where AI-assisted operations, plugins, and managed services may matter more than raw code novelty.
evidence: 9,718 stars show visible developer attention.
3,295 forks suggest users want to adapt or build from the project.
491 contributors indicate community participation.
250 open PRs reveal activity, backlog, or maintenance surface area.
opportunities.reviewPosture: Watch item: 250 open PRs may indicate active development, review backlog, or maintainer strain.
opportunities.risk: Legacy depth can slow productization; plugin compatibility and buyer discovery need careful validation.
opportunities.monetization: AI-assisted campaign operations, plugin maintenance, hosted reporting, or migration services for teams already using Mautic.
opportunities.decision: Review plugin marketplace gaps and unresolved PR themes before committing to a build.
opportunities.liveError: Command '['curl', '-fsSL', '-H', 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json', '-H', 'User-Agent: GitHubScout-Dashboard/1.0', '-H', 'X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28', 'https://api.github.com/repos/mautic/mautic']' returned non-zero exit status 56.
opportunities.description: Mautic: Open Source Marketing Automation Software.
opportunities.buyerPersona: Marketing teams using open-source automation, agencies maintaining Mautic, and companies avoiding HubSpot lock-in.
opportunities.painStatement: Mautic users face plugin maintenance, campaign complexity, and reporting gaps without enterprise-style support.
opportunities.productWedge: AI campaign ops plugin or managed Mautic maintenance/reporting service.
opportunities.firstOffer: AI weekly campaign health report for Mautic.

competitors.whyWin: Serve existing Mautic users who need practical ops improvements, not platform replacement.

opportunities.validationTest: Build a mock Mautic campaign health report and offer it to 20 Mautic agencies/users.
opportunities.riskToKill: Legacy plugin compatibility may eat too much time.

landingPageCopy.headline: AI campaign ops for Mautic teams.
landingPageCopy.subheadline: Weekly health reports, plugin maintenance, and automation recommendations without switching platforms.

opportunities.outreachDraft: Do you maintain Mautic for clients? I am testing an AI weekly campaign health report and plugin maintenance brief. Worth a look?
opportunities.pricingHypothesis: $499/mo managed reporting for agencies because it can be bundled into client retainers.
opportunities.trendContext: Open-source marketing automation remains attractive as teams push back on expensive suites.

workflowBeforeAfter.before: Manually inspect campaigns, emails, and deliverability issues.
workflowBeforeAfter.after: Receive a weekly health report with risks, recommendations, and client-ready notes.

opportunities.buildBuyPartner: Build plugin or managed service; partner with agencies.
